synopsis: Before the Clone Wars, pirate Iaco Stark's "commercial combine" corners the galaxy's bacta supply; Republic factions allied with the Trade Federation exploit the crisis to justify a military buildup, and the Jedi Council must untangle the intrigue. Features Qui-Gon Jinn, Obi-Wan, Plo Koon, Mace Windu.
title: Star Wars: The Stark Hyperspace War
